title: Form Submissions from external users
excerpt: Hi! I’m trying to understand the Form fields a little better. When you enable the “Updates Question” field in a form, if the submitter doesn’t currently have a monday.com account, the Updates is published by the Form’s o…

posts.author: akm (angelica kemper)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! I’m trying to understand the Form fields a little better. When you enable the “Updates Question” field in a form, if the submitter doesn’t currently have a monday.com account, the Updates is published by the Form’s owner - is this a fair statement? If so, is there a way to change it to “Unknown User” or “User not Found” instead, or am I just utilizing this field wrong? Thanks in advance

posts.author: akm (angelica kemper)
posts.cookedHtml:
Update: here’s the response I received from monday.com Support: Understanding that _____ is not a member of the account, I’m afraid the platform will not be able to register them as the one making the update.

In this scenario, I would suggest adding a text column where they can enter the project notes.
